question: Can PAXGUSDT monthly 180-day positive time-series momentum at 0.5x remain profitable after conservative costs and a 4% annual full-capital hurdle while reducing drawdown versus passive 0.5x exposure across sequential untouched periods?
development_gate: data PASS; 180d base/stress >0; max drawdown >-12% and better than passive 0.5x; 90d/270d base >=0; turnover <=6
evaluation_gate: data PASS; 180d base/stress >0; stress after 4% annual full-capital hurdle >0; both years positive; max drawdown >-10% and better than passive; 90d/270d base >0
confirmation_gate: data PASS; 180d base/stress >0; stress after hurdle >0; both calendar-year slices positive; max drawdown >-12% and better than passive; 90d/270d base >=0; evaluation+confirmation compounded >0
holdout_release_rule: fetch development only after checkpoint; evaluation only after development pass; confirmation only after evaluation pass
large_data_policy: Git-external checksum-verified Binance public data; manifests and identities retained in research
